metaTitle: YouTube Thumbnail Grabber — Download YouTube Thumbnails Free
metaDescription: Download YouTube video thumbnails in max resolution instantly. Just paste the YouTube URL and save the thumbnail image. Free, fast, and no login required.

howto.description: Paste any YouTube video URL into the input box. Supports all URL formats including youtu.be short links.
All available thumbnail resolutions are displayed automatically.
Click Save on any resolution to download the thumbnail image directly to your device.

why: No login or API key required — works instantly
Supports all YouTube URL formats including youtu.be short links
Multiple resolutions: Max, HD, SD and more
Works completely offline after thumbnails are loaded
No sign-up, no limits, completely free forever

faq.q: Do I need a YouTube account to use this?
faq.a: No. You just need the URL of any public YouTube video. No login or API key required.
All standard YouTube URL formats are supported including youtube.com/watch?v=, youtu.be/, and youtube.com/embed/ links.

faq.q: Why is the Max Resolution thumbnail not available for some videos?
faq.a: Not all videos have a maximum resolution (1280x720) thumbnail. If it's not available, the next best resolution will be shown.

faq.q: Can I use downloaded thumbnails freely?
faq.a: Thumbnails are owned by the video creator or YouTube. Please respect copyright and only use thumbnails with permission or for personal use.
Yes. The tool is fully optimized for mobile browsers including Safari on iOS and Chrome on Android.
